evaluation: Performed synchronously by ynx-cloudd from persistent local telemetry.

rules.operatorAction: Stop readiness traffic, preserve the corrupt file, restore the last verified telemetry backup or repair storage, then restart.
Inspect bounded traces and provider health; enter user-exit mode if data-control operations are unsafe.
Inspect route saturation and provider latency before changing concurrency limits.
Inspect inflight saturation; do not raise limits without load evidence.
